description: A square designed 'LABOR NEWS' announcement card in DOL's branded template. Background photo depicts industrial sanitation/cleaning: a blue floor-scrubbing machine on a wet concrete floor with hose lines, a worker (legs/coveralls) in the foreground, and another person partly visible seated, plus a yellow caution wet-floor sign at lower left. Overlaid is the small navy 'LABOR NEWS' tab and a bold white sans-serif headline on translucent navy ribbon blocks: 'Department of Labor secures agreement from cleaning contractor to pay penalties, take steps to prevent dangerous child labor employment.' A navy bar at lower right reads 'dol.gov/newsroom.' This is a designed enforcement-announcement graphic (not a candid photo) about a contractor (QSI) that illegally employed children on overnight sanitation shifts at meat/poultry plants. Messaging technique: branded news-promo card portraying the agency as cracking down on dangerous child labor; audience is the general public, workers, and employers. Posted Jan 16 2025, before the Jan 20 inauguration, using the recurring DOL template.
notable_text: LABOR NEWS / Department of Labor secures agreement from cleaning contractor to pay penalties, take steps to prevent dangerous child labor employment / dol.gov/newsroom
